headline: Ameriprise Financial: Recurring Revenues, High ROE, And Still Moderate Valuation
summary: Ameriprise Financial stock analysis: strong recurring revenue, 30% margins, $1.7T AUM, discounted 11.2x P/E, risks. Click here to read more on the AMP stock.
